productDisplayName: SDL by Sweet Dreams Women White Night suits
description: Style NotePerfect to slip into on a lazy day, to wear at a girly pyjama party or just for after-hours at home, these pyjama sets from SDL Loungewear instantly transport you to a world of calm. Crafted from soft cotton in pretty and feminine styles, they offer exemplary comfort and a flattering Fit.Product DetailsWhite pyjama top with round neck, printed piping, short puffed sleeves with short ruffled hem, vents at the hem and strawberry flock print on chest.Matching capri pyjama bottoms in red and pink strawberry print, elasticated waist with drawstrings, pockets on the sidesMatching shorts in red and pink strawberry print, elasticated waist with drawstrings, pockets on the sidesMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmDo not bleach, dry clean or iron on decoration or printTumble dry, normal, low heatIron low and dry in shade   Size and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing size M
